name: Cod Steaks with Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steaks in an oiled baking dish.
2. Cook onion and mushrooms for 3 minutes in the water.
3. Add butter, stir in flour and mix.
4. Add milk; heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
5. Season and pour over cod.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
7. Bake at moderate temperature of 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes or until fish is tender. Makes 4 servings.
